plugin.name: Assistente de Galgame
plugin.description: Deixe a gatinha acompanhar você jogando seus Galgame
entries.galgame_get_status.name: Get galgame plugin status
entries.galgame_get_status.description: Return the current bridge connection status, bound game, latest error, and mode.
entries.galgame_install_textractor.name: Install Textractor
entries.galgame_install_textractor.descr: Detect, download, and install TextractorCLI.exe, then refresh the galgame_plugin bridge and memory reader status.
entries.galgame_download_rapidocr_models: Download missing model files for the current RapidOCR language and OCR version into the plugin model cache.
entries.galgame_install_dxcam.name: Install DXcam
entries.galgame_install_dxcam.descriptio: Detect and install the DXcam screenshot dependency, then refresh the galgame_plugin OCR capture backend status.
entries.galgame_get_snapshot.name: Get galgame snapshot
entries.galgame_get_snapshot.description: Return the current game snapshot and stale status.
entries.galgame_get_history.name: Get galgame history
entries.galgame_get_history.description: Return recent events, stable dialogue history, and choice history.
entries.galgame_set_mode.name: Set galgame mode
entries.galgame_set_mode.description: Set silent, companion, or choice_advisor mode, with optional notification updates.
entries.galgame_set_ocr_backend.name: Set OCR / capture backend
entries.galgame_set_ocr_backend.descript: Switch the OCR text recognition backend and screenshot backend. This only affects OCR reading and does not change Agent click safety policy.
entries.galgame_set_ocr_timing.name: Set OCR recognition timing
entries.galgame_set_ocr_timing.descripti: Set the OCR Reader trigger mode and polling interval. The DXcam capture backend follows OCR triggers.
entries.galgame_set_llm_vision.name: Set LLM vision assistance
entries.galgame_set_llm_vision.descripti: Toggle direct screenshot upload for low-confidence OCR Agent scenes and set the maximum image side length.
entries.galgame_set_ocr_screen_templates: Save OCR screen classification templates. Templates only affect OCR Reader, not Bridge SDK or Memory Reader.
entries.galgame_build_ocr_screen_templat: Generate an editable screen template draft from the current OCR runtime, window info, and recent recognized text.
entries.galgame_validate_ocr_screen_temp: Replay current OCR runtime and recent text to validate screen template match results.
entries.galgame_get_ocr_screen_awareness: Return the latest OCR screen awareness screenshot. Available only when Vision is explicitly enabled and the short-term cache has not expired.
entries.galgame_train_ocr_screen_awarene: Train a lightweight prototype classifier from labeled JSONL samples and export a deployable JSON model.
entries.galgame_evaluate_ocr_screen_awar: Evaluate a lightweight screen awareness model using labeled JSONL samples and optionally write an evaluation report.
entries.galgame_bind_game.name: Bind galgame game
entries.galgame_bind_game.description: Bind the specified game_id. Pass an empty string to clear the manual binding and restore automatic selection.
Save or clear OCR Reader screenshot crop configuration by process name.
entries.galgame_auto_recalibrate_ocr_dia: Automatically recalibrate the dialogue region for the currently attached OCR target window and save it for the current window resolution.
entries.galgame_apply_recommended_ocr_ca: Apply the current OCR Reader recommended screenshot profile after user confirmation and record a rollback point.
entries.galgame_rollback_ocr_capture_pro: Rollback the most recent OCR screenshot calibration created by applying a recommended profile.
entries.galgame_list_memory_reader_proce: Return selectable Memory Reader processes, including exe path, detected engine, and detection reason.
entries.galgame_set_memory_reader_target: Lock or clear the Memory Reader manual process target.
entries.galgame_list_ocr_windows.name: List OCR candidate windows
entries.galgame_list_ocr_windows.descrip: Return selectable windows for the current OCR Reader, optionally including the read-only exclusion list.
entries.galgame_set_ocr_window_target.de: Lock or clear the OCR Reader manual target window.
entries.galgame_open_ui.name: Open galgame UI
entries.galgame_open_ui.description: Return the access path for the galgame_plugin static UI.
entries.galgame_explain_line.name: Explain current or specified line
entries.galgame_explain_line.description: Explain the current snapshot line or the line for the specified line_id.
entries.galgame_summarize_scene.name: Summarize current scene
entries.galgame_summarize_scene.descript: Summarize the current scene or recent story progress for the specified scene_id.
entries.galgame_suggest_choice.name: Suggest current choice
entries.galgame_suggest_choice.descripti: Provide recommended ranking and reasons for the currently visible choices.
entries.galgame_agent_command.name: Send command to Game LLM Agent
entries.galgame_agent_command.descriptio: Query Agent status, query context, send messages, or control standby.
entries.galgame_continue_auto_advance.de: Switch to automatic advance mode and send a continue-advance message to the Game LLM Agent.
entries.galgame_get_character_profile.de: Retorna o perfil predefinido do personagem de galgame especificado.
entries.galgame_set_character_mode.name: Definir modo de personagem
entries.galgame_set_character_mode.descr: Alterna o modo de perfis entre desativado e personagem fixo.
entries.galgame_get_character_list.name: Listar personagens de galgame
entries.galgame_get_character_list.descr: Retorna os personagens predefinidos disponíveis para o jogo atual.
entries.galgame_import_character_data.de: Importa um arquivo JSON de perfil de personagem fornecido pelo usuário.
entries.galgame_get_scene_context.name: Obter contexto da cena
entries.galgame_get_scene_context.descri: Retorna resumo da cena, falas-chave, personagens visíveis e escolhas confirmadas.
entries.galgame_get_story_so_far.name: Obter história até agora
entries.galgame_get_story_so_far.descrip: Retorna memória entre cenas e progresso recente da história.
entries.galgame_get_recent_lines.name: Obter falas recentes
entries.galgame_get_recent_lines.descrip: Retorna falas recentes estáveis e observadas.
entries.galgame_get_push_history.name: Obter histórico de envios
entries.galgame_get_push_history.descrip: Retorna metadados recentes de envios de contexto sem texto bruto das falas.
